sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO c_yzd_chemistry_t (companyid,personname,sexes,education,cardnumber,nation,politicalposition, school,major,telephone,station,wechat,qq,homeplace,lifeplace, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($companyid$,'$personname$','$sexes$','$education$','$cardnumber$','$nation$','$politicalposition$', '$school$','$major$','$telephone$','$station$','$wechat$','$qq$','$homeplace$','$lifeplace$', 1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM C_YZD_CHEMISTRY_T WHERE VALIDFLAG > 0
companyid = $companyid$
(personname like '%$personname$%')
sexes = '$sexes$'
education = '$education$'
telephone = '$telephone$'
cardnumber = '$cardnumber$'
politicalposition = '$politicalposition$'
school = '$school$'
station = '$station$'

SELECT * FROM C_YZD_CHEMISTRY_T WHERE VALIDFLAG > 0
companyid = $companyid$
(personname like '%$personname$%')
sexes = '$sexes$'
education = '$education$'
telephone = '$telephone$'
cardnumber = '$cardnumber$'
politicalposition = '$politicalposition$'
school = '$school$'
station = '$station$'
ORDER BY ID

SELECT COUNT(t1.ID) FROM C_YZD_CHEMISTRY_T t1 LEFT JOIN c_company_t t2 ON t1.companyid = t2.id WHERE t1.VALIDFLAG > 0
(t1.personname like '%$personname$%')
t1.sexes = '$sexes$'
t1.education = '$education$'
t1.telephone like '%$telephone$%'
t1.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
t1.politicalposition = '$politicalposition$'
t1.school = '$school$'
t1.station = '$station$'
(t2.companyname like '%$companyname$%')

SELECT t1.*,t2.companyname FROM C_YZD_CHEMISTRY_T t1 LEFT JOIN c_company_t t2 ON t1.companyid = t2.id WHERE t1.VALIDFLAG > 0
(t1.personname like '%$personname$%')
t1.sexes = '$sexes$'
t1.education = '$education$'
t1.telephone like '%$telephone$%'
t1.cardnumber like '%$cardnumber$%'
t1.politicalposition = '$politicalposition$'
t1.school = '$school$'
t1.station = '$station$'
(t2.companyname like '%$companyname$%')
ORDER BY t1.ID
SELECT * FROM C_YZD_CHEMISTRY_T WHERE VALIDFLAG > 0 AND ID = $id$
SELECT count(1) FROM C_YZD_CHEMISTRY_T WHERE VALIDFLAG > 0 AND cardnumber ='$cardnumber$'
sqlMap.update: UPDATE C_YZD_CHEMISTRY_T SET VALIDFLAG = 0,updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE ID = $id$
